title: Peppery Chewy Dutch Onion Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and hearty dish perfect for a sick-day meal featuring onions cooked to perfection in a spicy sauce.

ingredients.name: Vegetable oil or low-sodium vegetable broth

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the vegetable oil and sesame oil.
When hot, add the onions and cook until they are soft but not mushy, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Pour in the low-sodium soy sauce, water or broth, pepper flakes, and salt. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium and stir in the cornstarch mixture until it thickens and coats all of the onions.
Stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes until the sauce is smooth and glossy.
Serve hot with green onions (if using) on top as a garnish.
